products.name: Linux devs are fighting the new age-gated internet

products.summary: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.

products.name: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger
products.summary: More than 50 employees have reportedly left Elon Musk’s newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising questions about burnout, leadership changes, talent poaching, and whether liquidity events weakened retention incentives.
